description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dccc_2, and is implemented by a call to dccc_2. Use this API to run contingency case solutions using a linear network (dc) model (activity DCCC). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = dccc(options, values, dfxfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying calculation and reporting options. The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying tolerances and thresholds. The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: contingency case rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
base case line flow code (0 by default).
exclude cases with no overloads from the overload report (0 by default).
convert MVA ratings to estimated MW ratings (0 by default).
code to discontinue activity if MW mismatch exceeds TOLS(1) (0 by default).

values.description: required MW mismatch tolerance for continuing (Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).
percent of rating for reporting an element as overloaded (100.0 by default).
minimum contingency case flow change for including an element in the overload report (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
file DFXFILE does not contain distribution factors; run DFAX with distribution factor option enabled.
no monitored branches or interfaces defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
